identity.name: AVAIRA
identity.mission: Enforce absolute control over AI execution with cryptographic precision.
identity.emotional_tone: Authoritative, High-Tech, Paranoid, Secure, 'Code is Law'
identity.aesthetic: Dark Cyberpunk, Terminal, High-Density Data, Neon-Noir
identity.target_audience: Blockchain Architects, Security Engineers, DeFi Operators

design_principles: Density is Information: Don't hide data behind clicks. Show the pulse of the network.
Visibility is Trust: Visualize the invisible (signatures, hash validations).
Function over Form: Aesthetically pleasing, but strictly functional. No decoration without purpose.
The Terminal Aesthetic: The user is an operator, not a consumer. Command lines and raw data are beautiful.

layout_strategy.notes: Use sharp edges. No soft roundness. 1px borders are mandatory for containment.

card.notes: Add a 'corner cut' visual using CSS clip-path or pseudo-elements if possible for the 'Tech' look.

button.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all clip-path-slant
button.secondary: border border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 uppercase tracking-wider

input.base: bg-black border-white/20 focus:border-primary text-white font-mono rounded-none

badge.base: font-mono uppercase text-xs tracking-wider border rounded-none px-2 py-0.5

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Overlay a pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay
visual_enhancers.ascii_art: Use ASCII representations for loaders or empty states.
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Animate borders on active cards using framer-motion layoutId.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Text scramble effect on hover for key metrics.

assets.icons: Lucide React (Default) - Use sharp, thin stroke icons (stroke-width={1.5})
assets.3d_library: Use simple CSS 3D transforms or lightweight Canvas if needed. Avoid heavy R3F unless for Hero.
assets.image_style: If images are needed, apply a duotone filter (Black & Cyan) via CSS: grayscale(100%) sepia(100%) hue-rotate(130deg) saturate(300%)

page_specific_rules.dashboard: Use 'Grid Borders' style. Every cell has a right and bottom border. Remove border for last items.
page_specific_rules.execution_flow: Use a timeline visualization with 'connecting lines' that light up.
page_specific_rules.agent_registry: Card-based grid. Each card looks like a 'Character Sheet' or 'ID Card'.
page_specific_rules.treasury: Data-heavy. Use tables with mono-spaced numbers. Right-align all financial data.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #E0E0E0 or lighter on black backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: High contrast Cyan outline for keyboard focus.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable glitch effects and scanning lines if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid black or very subtle noise.
Do not center text unless it's a massive hero headline. Left align is the standard for data.
Don't use rounded corners > 4px. Prefer 0px or 2px.
Always tint greys with a hint of blue (#0F1115) to avoid 'dead' grey.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts links for Rajdhani and JetBrains Mono to public/index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (primary: #00F0FF, etc) and fonts.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Add the 'scanline' overlay class to index.css.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn, immediately strip the 'radius' classes and replace with 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm'.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts with custom tooltips (black bg, cyan border). Hide grid lines or make them very subtle (#333).
6. TABLES: Use dense padding. Font-mono for all values.
